Home › Services › Lawn Mowing

Weekly lawn mowing in Guelph

From $27.50 per cut — trimming and blowdown included, every single visit. Same crew, same day each week, no contracts.

Get a Free Quote Call or Text
Every cut includes

The whole job, not just the mow

  • Mowing at 3 inches — the healthiest height for Guelph lawns
  • Trimming around trees, fences, beds and obstacles
  • Edging along walkways and driveways as needed
  • Full blowdown of clippings from all hard surfaces
  • Mulched clippings that feed your soil (bagging on request)

One quoted price covers all of it. No add-on surprises on your invoice.

Lawn health

Why weekly, and why 3 inches

Grass is healthiest when you never remove more than a third of the blade at once. Weekly cutting during Guelph’s growing season keeps you inside that rule, which means thicker turf, deeper roots, and fewer weeds fighting for space. It’s the same guidance the City of Guelph gives homeowners: mow high, mow regularly, and leave the clippings to feed the lawn.

Cutting short to “buy time” between visits does the opposite — it stresses the grass, invites crabgrass, and browns out fast in a dry July. We’d rather cut your lawn properly every week at a fair price than badly every two weeks at a false saving. And when growth genuinely slows, we’ll tell you to skip a week. You’re never locked into paying for cuts you don’t need.

Equipment

Commercial gear, residential care

We run commercial mowers and trimmers — the same class of equipment the franchises use. Sharp blades, clean cuts, and the striped finish you see in these photos, which are all real Yardex lawns in Guelph.

The difference is who’s behind the machine: a small local crew whose whole reputation rides on how your lawn looks when we drive away.

Scheduling

How service works

1. Get your quote

Send your address and we’ll reply within 24 hours with a firm per-cut price. Mowing starts at $27.50 for smaller city lots.

2. Pick your day

You get a consistent weekly day and the same crew each visit. Rain pushes your cut to the next dry day — we’ll keep you posted.

3. Stay because it’s good

No contracts, no cancellation fees. Skip a week or stop anytime with a text. Most clients stay all season anyway.

Mowing questions

Frequently asked

What happens if it rains on my mowing day?

We shift your cut to the next dry day and let you know. Your spot in the following week’s schedule doesn’t change.

Can I skip a week?

Yes — just text us by the day before. In slow-growth stretches (like an August dry spell) we’ll often suggest skipping so you’re not paying for a cut your lawn doesn’t need.

Do you bag the clippings?

By default we mulch clippings back into the lawn — it feeds the soil and keeps your lawn healthier. Bagging is available on request.

How short do you cut?

Around 3 inches. It’s the healthiest height for Guelph lawns: deeper roots, fewer weeds, better drought resistance. We never scalp lawns to stretch out visits.

Is trimming included, or extra?

Included. Every cut comes with trimming around trees, fences and beds, plus a blowdown of your driveway and walkways. The price you’re quoted is the whole job.

Wondering about cost? See lawn mowing prices in Guelph for a full, honest breakdown.
